message:
Running command: # Still in routability iterations - overflow bouncing between 0.36-0.60
# This is typical for routability-driven placement with high density (0.528)
# Wait longer for it to converge
sleep 120
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_gpl.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "Process ended"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_gpl.log
